root_text.an10.229-232:1.1: “Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato idhekacco kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati …pe…
root_text.an10.229-232:1.2: idhekacco kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an10.229-232:1.5: cattārīsāya, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato idhekacco kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati …pe…
root_text.an10.229-232:1.6: idhekacco kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati”.

translation_text.an10.229-232:0.3: Untitled Discourses on Ten to Forty Qualities (2nd)
translation_text.an10.229-232:1.1: “When they have ten qualities, some people, when their body breaks up, after death, are reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell. …
translation_text.an10.229-232:1.2: some people, when their body breaks up, after death, are reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm …
